message:
feat(beads): Add comprehensive descriptions, test tasks, and optimize dependencies

Complete revision of the 10-epic improvement roadmap:

## Changes
- Added detailed descriptions to all 10 epics with:
  - Business justification
  - Technical approach
  - Scope and success criteria
  - Dependencies documentation

- Updated 50+ subtasks with comprehensive requirements including:
  - Code examples and implementation patterns
  - Acceptance criteria
  - Logging requirements
  - Implementation notes

- Created 20 new test tasks (unit + e2e for each epic):
  - [Examples] Unit tests and e2e terminal simulation
  - [Syntax] Unit tests and markdown rendering e2e
  - [Bench] Benchmark validation and suite e2e
  - [Async] Command execution and lifecycle tests
  - [Derive] Macro generation and real model tests
  - [Table] Width/alignment and conformance tests
  - [Error] Migration and cross-crate propagation tests
  - [PropTest] Generator and roundtrip property tests
  - [WASM] WASM paths and browser automation tests
  - [Theme] Application and switching tests

## Statistics
- Total issues: 157
- Open: 109
- Blocked: 102 (proper dependency chains)
- Ready to work: 7 epics

## Cross-Epic Dependencies
- Async depends on Benchmarks (need baseline first)
- Derive Macro depends on Examples (for demonstration)
- WASM depends on Syntax Highlighting AND Table Rendering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
